actions.script: if (!rr?.rendered || !rr?.pdfBytes) { ec.web.response.sendError(500, rr?.message ?: 'Error renderizando PDF de orden') return } ec.web.response.setContentType(rr.contentType ?: 'application/pdf') ec.web.response.setHeader('Content-Disposition', "inline; filename=\"${rr.filename ?: "orden-${orderId}.pdf"}\"") ec.web.response.setContentLength(((byte[]) rr.pdfBytes).length) ec.web.response.outputStream.write((byte[]) rr.pdfBytes)

String url = "download?orderId=${java.net.URLEncoder.encode(orderId.toString(), 'UTF-8')}" if (orderPartSeqId) url += "&orderPartSeqId=${java.net.URLEncoder.encode(orderPartSeqId.toString(), 'UTF-8')}" if (documentType) url += "&documentType=${java.net.URLEncoder.encode(documentType.toString(), 'UTF-8')}" sri.sendRedirectAndStopRender(url)
